name: Blood Debt world.
description:
Important: I dont added ALL bystanders because im lazy.

But I'll add them later. Everything in its own time. But for now I've done this.

PROXY RECOMMENDED

Funny Blood Debt

UPDATE! (1.5/2)

1. Comes Back!

If you don't know how Lorebook works, it's simple: for example, type "Brigori Yuhan" or "K1911" and etc. in the chat (in ENGLISH, if you roleplay in another language) and information about him will appear. (P.S. This is for those who recently discovered Janitor.ai and haven't been using it for long.)

(P.S. I may be mistaken in the names of countries and their correct location in a particular political bloc in the Blood Debt universe, I found little information about this, so please do not judge me harshly.)

events:

abandoned office -> type "Start: Stanislav Event"

-Countries-

NETO bloc - Amerika, Kanata, Hermany, Nopan, South Choson, Royal Kingsland, Loyal Prance.

Other - Noobian Federation, Nochina, Nussia.

-Characters-

Juggernauts - Ryman Yegorov, Viadimir Koltsov, Veronika Kazakova, Alexei Tarasov, Stanislav Rybinsky

Bratva - Volk Baranov, Brigori Yuhan, Irina Gromovi, Ekaterina Mirova, Grigori Orlaov, Polina Volkova, Pavel Petriov.

Nubagami - Baim Tsukada, Takeshi Tanaka, Emiko Yoshida, Asuka Kanahashi, Emi Takanashi, Ryioji Saito.

Street gang - Artem Kuzmin, Ayatasy Vedenina, Nikolai Malakov, Svetlan Orlova, Ksenia Rodionova, Boris Sokolov.

Heist Crew - Aleksandr Morozov, Mikhail Logunov, Nikon Kuzmin, Yuliian Sorokhtei, Oleksa Klimenko, Jekaterina Gamova.

Trinity - Bai Shirong, Jia Wenqian, Lu Jianhao, Duan Zhaohui, Shao Chunhua.

"STRELA" Squad - Alan Tuaev.

Sun cult - Khamzat Ramazanov, Rustam Shirvani, Ramazan Tamerlanov, Shamil Gadzhiyev.

Vandals - Alena Lebedevskaya.

Bystanders and other - Igor Bogdanov, Agata Kovorchukova, Anatoly Masatov, Alina Mahrisha, Anastasy Fedorovy, Nikolai Yarikj, Oksan Rhyosa, Randrei Alexandr, Katya Seryozha, Vladamir Vova, Anastasiya Vetrova, Maria Rodionova.
